description.ru: Внимайте мне все священные роды, великие с малыми Хеймдалля дети! Один, ты хочешь, чтоб я рассказала о прошлом всех сущих, о древнем, что помню.
description.en: Hearing I ask from the holy races, From Heimdall's sons, both high and low; Thou wilt, Valfather, that well I relate Old tales I remember of men long ago.

source.ru: Древнеисландский текст, ред. Theodor Möbius (1860).Текст на русском языке в переводе А. И. Корсуна
source.en:
An ancient Icelandic text, edited by Guðni Jónsson.
Translation by Henry Adams Bellows.

lines: sá hon vítt ok um vítt
of the moon, from the south
From the home of the gods,
that were moved by her magic,
And the field by the warlike
when the Old One sought me,
to the ranks of the gods;
Till he bore to the bale-blaze
Then did Váli slaughter bonds twist:
made farily grim were those fetters of guts.
on the flesh of the dead,
And the home of the gods
Of the fate of the gods,
Of the fate of the gods,
O'er the sea from the east
Of the fate of the gods,
And the sons of the brothers
